introSection: Kiddie Coaster is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Fun Spot America in Kissimmee, Florida, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders. Kiddie Coaster has a snake-shaped train.

fullText:
Kiddie Coaster is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Fun Spot America in Kissimmee, Florida, USA.



Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 10 riders. Kiddie Coaster has a snake-shaped train.
